sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Commercial Metals Company (CMC) Q2 2026 Earnings Recap
feed.summary: Commercial Metals Company (CMC) reported strong Q2 2026 earnings with an adjusted EPS of $1.16 on revenue of $2.13B, marking a significant recovery and explosive year-over-year growth. Despite the strong performance, the stock declined 2.5%, suggesting investor skepticism about the sustainability of these results. The North America Steel Group largely drove the revenue, though market participants are questioning the durability of current margins amidst the industry's cyclical nature.

feed.title: CNX Resources (CNX) 2026 proxy: cash flow, Apex deal, buybacks and CEO transition
feed.summary: CNX Resources' 2026 proxy statement details robust financial performance in 2025, including $646 million in free cash flow and $528 million in share repurchases, cutting the share count by 37% since 2020. The company completed a $518 million acquisition of Apex Energy's natural gas assets and continued its focus on ESG with a "Radical Transparency" program and methane-linked executive incentives. The proxy also announces a leadership transition, with Alan Shepard becoming CEO effective January 1, 2026, succeeding Nick Deiuliis.

feed.title: Vanguard disaggregation leaves Central Garden & Pet Co (CENT) at 0 shares
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group has filed an Amendment No. 14 to a Schedule 13G/A, reporting 0 shares of Central Garden & Pet Co Common Stock, representing 0% of the class. This change is due to an internal realignment effective January 12, 2026, where certain Vanguard subsidiaries will now report their holdings separately as per SEC Release No. 34-39538. Ashley Grim, Head of Global Fund Administration, signed the filing dated March 26, 2026.

feed.title: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC Announces an Investigation Against Elevance Health, Inc. (ELV) and Encourages Investors to Learn More About the Investigation
feed.summary: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC has launched an investigation into potential claims against Elevance Health, Inc. (ELV) for alleged corporate wrongdoing by its officers and/or directors. The firm is encouraging investors who purchased Elevance securities prior to April 18, 2024, and still hold them, to join the investigation. Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC represents investors in class actions on a contingency fee basis and seeks to restore investor capital and ensure corporate accountability.

feed.title: C4 Therapeutics Begins Phase 1b Trial for Multiple Myeloma
feed.summary: C4 Therapeutics has initiated a Phase 1b clinical trial combining cemsidomide with elranatamab and dexamethasone for relapsed or refractory multiple myeloma, targeting readout by mid-2027. The trial aims to assess optimal dosing and safety, with secondary measures including overall response and duration of response. This strategic move positions cemsidomide for combination therapies to achieve deeper and more durable responses in myeloma treatment.

feed.title: 6-Day Rally Sends Skyworks Solutions Stock Up 5.7%
feed.summary: Skyworks Solutions (SWKS) experienced a 6-day winning streak, increasing its stock by 5.7% and its market cap by about $460 million to $8.5 billion. Despite this recent rally, the company's overall operating performance and financial condition are deemed moderate, leading to a "Fairly Priced" valuation. The article also provides historical performance comparisons against the S&P 500 and lists key financial figures for the company.

feed.title: Calix Inc Stock: Strong Growth in Broadband Platforms Amid Evolving Telecom Sector Dynamics
feed.summary: Calix Inc continues to demonstrate strong revenue and earnings growth, positions itself as a key player in the broadband infrastructure sector. The company's cloud-based solutions and focus on modernizing networks for service providers make it an attractive stock for North American investors. Despite competitive pressures and execution risks, Calix's strategic initiatives and financial performance suggest long-term value creation.

feed.title: Atmos Energy Corp. Stock: Steady Utility Play Amid Sector Shifts and Institutional Moves
feed.summary: Atmos Energy Corp. (ATO) is presented as a strong defensive utility play in the natural gas distribution sector, providing essential services across key U.S. markets. The company's stable business model, strategic growth initiatives, and robust financial health make it attractive to income-focused and conservative investors, despite long-term challenges from electrification trends. Institutional activity and strong balance sheet metrics underscore investor confidence in its resilience and growth prospects.

feed.title: Accounting for Contingencies for Not-for-Profits
feed.summary: Not-for-profit organizations face uncertainties that can lead to contingencies, necessitating careful evaluation and accounting for accurate financial statements. Contingencies can result in potential losses or gains, with loss contingencies requiring accrual or disclosure based on probability and estimability. Common loss contingencies for not-for-profits include noncompliance with donor restrictions, potential loss of tax-exempt status, and litigation, while gain contingencies are only accrued when virtually certain.

feed.title: Duke Energy Vote On Supermajority Rules Puts Shareholder Influence In Focus
feed.summary: Duke Energy (NYSE: DUK) is proposing to remove supermajority voting requirements from its Certificate of Incorporation, a measure that will be voted on at the upcoming annual general meeting. If approved, this change would allow future governance modifications to pass with a simple majority, increasing shareholder influence. Investors are closely watching this development to understand its implications for shareholder rights and the company's future direction.

feed.title: Beyond Meat (BYND) to Release Earnings on Tuesday
feed.summary: Beyond Meat (BYND) is scheduled to release its quarterly earnings after the market closes on Tuesday, March 31st. Analysts anticipate a loss of ($0.12) per share and revenue of $62.997 million. The stock is currently trading near its one-year low, with a "Strong Sell" consensus rating from analysts, despite significant institutional interest in Q4.

feed.title: Baozun: Look Past Mixed Results (NASDAQ:BZUN)
feed.summary: Baozun (BZUN) received a 'Buy' rating despite mixed 4Q25 results, which saw revenue outperform but earnings fall short. Management projects a significant 63% CAGR for operating income to CNY550 million by FY2028. The stock is currently considered attractively valued with a PEG ratio of 0.14x, suggesting strong future growth potential.

feed.title: UnitedHealth Group Incorporated Stock: Navigating Healthcare Challenges and Opportunities in a Dynam
feed.summary: UnitedHealth Group, the largest U.S. health insurer, faces recent stock pressure due to higher medical costs but maintains strong fundamentals through diversified operations and AI innovations. The company operates through UnitedHealthcare and Optum, benefiting from economies of scale and technology-driven solutions. Investors are closely watching upcoming earnings for insights into Medicare Advantage trends and long-term growth potential and should monitor medical loss ratio, Optum growth, and forward estimates.

feed.title: Otis Worldwide Corp Stock: Steady Elevator Leader with Reliable Service Revenue Driving Long-Term Value for Investors
feed.summary: Otis Worldwide Corp (OTIS) is highlighted as a steady leader in the elevator and escalator industry, with its extensive service contracts providing reliable, recurring revenue. The article notes Otis's strong market position, conservative investment appeal due to predictable cash flows, and focus on modernization and sustainability. While construction slowdowns pose risks, the company's global diversification, technological innovation, and defensive qualities make it suitable for balanced investment portfolios.

feed.title: Did BrightSpring’s Push into Acquisitions and High-Population CON States Just Shift Its (BTSG) Investment Narrative?
feed.summary: BrightSpring Health Services (BTSG) is actively pursuing acquisitions and expansions in high-population, certificate-of-need states, aiming for geographic density and capital-efficient growth. While this strategy could reshape its investment narrative, promising substantial revenue and earnings growth, it also introduces risks such as higher debt, integration challenges, and reimbursement dependence. Investors are urged to consider these factors alongside optimistic analyst forecasts suggesting a significant upside to its current price.

feed.title: Did BrightSpring’s Push into Acquisitions and High-Population CON States Just Shift Its (BTSG) Investment Narrative?
feed.summary: BrightSpring Health Services (BTSG) is pursuing an aggressive growth strategy through acquisitions and de novo expansions in high-population and certificate-of-need states. This strategy aims to enhance geographic density and capitalize on home- and community-based care, but it also raises concerns about increased leverage and integration risks. Investors need to weigh the potential for growth against these financial and operational challenges, especially regarding the company's ability to execute disciplined M&A and manage reimbursement pressures.

feed.title: From Frustration to Efficiency: How CBIZ Transformed HR and Payroll
feed.summary: CBIZ helped a real estate company with 1,000 employees overcome significant HR and payroll challenges, transitioning them from disparate, inefficient systems to a single, integrated platform. This transformation led to substantial cost savings, improved reporting, increased HR productivity, and personalized support. The company now benefits from streamlined processes and enhanced strategic capabilities for its HR team.

feed.title: Is 11.4% Fall In Ciena (CIEN) Stock A Buying Opportunity?
feed.summary: This article discusses whether the 11.4% fall in Ciena (CIEN) stock presents a buying opportunity. It provides no further details beyond the headline, suggesting the main content may have failed to load or was not present in the provided snippet.

Consequently, Vanguard no longer claims beneficial ownership over these disaggregated holdings.

feed.title: [SCHEDULE 13G/A] BED BATH & BEYOND, INC. Amended Passive Investment Disclosure | BBBY SEC Filing
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group has filed an amended Schedule 13G/A for Bed Bath & Beyond Inc., indicating that as of March 13, 2026, it beneficially owns 0 shares of common stock. This change reflects an internal realignment by Vanguard effective January 12, 2026, where certain subsidiaries will report beneficial ownership separately, in accordance with SEC guidance. The filing clarifies that Vanguard no longer has or is deemed to have beneficial ownership over securities held by these disaggregated subsidiaries.

feed.title: Moderna Inc. stock: mRNA pioneer's strategic pivot amid biotech sector challenges and vaccine market
feed.summary: Moderna Inc. continues to be a leading player in the biotechnology sector, leveraging its mRNA platform for innovation in vaccines and therapeutics. The company is strategically diversifying its pipeline beyond COVID-19 to include treatments for respiratory viruses, oncology, and rare diseases. Investors are closely monitoring its clinical trial progress, especially for its RSV vaccine and personalized cancer vaccine, and its financial resilience in a challenging biotech environment.

feed.title: Navigating Conflicts: Fairness Opinions in Private Equity Related-Party Deals
feed.summary: Related-party transactions in private equity, such as GP-led continuation funds or cross-fund transfers, often face scrutiny due to potential conflicts of interest and questions of self-dealing. A fairness opinion provides an independent financial assessment of such transactions, ensuring the consideration is fair from a financial perspective for specified parties. This independent analysis helps to reduce risk, support fiduciary duties, and build confidence in decision-making processes, especially when market checks are limited or conflicts are hard to mitigate.

feed.title: UBS cuts price target on TransDigm Group Incorporated (TDG) to $1,800, keeps buy rating
feed.summary: UBS has adjusted its price target for TransDigm Group Incorporated (TDG) to $1,800, down from its previous target. Despite the reduction in the price target, the firm has maintained its "buy" rating on the stock. This move indicates continued confidence in TransDigm's performance, even with a revised valuation expectation.

feed.title: Is It Time To Reassess Digital Realty (DLR) After Its Strong 12-Month Share Price Run
feed.summary: Digital Realty (DLR) has seen strong share price performance over the last year, with recent interest in data center stocks keeping it in focus. This analysis evaluates DLR using Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) and Price-to-Earnings (P/E) ratios, finding it undervalued by 26.4% based on DCF but overvalued when considering its P/E of 47.36x against industry averages. The article also presents "Narratives" for bull and bear cases, suggesting fair values of US$198.38 and US$110.45 per share, respectively, highlighting the differing assumptions investors can apply.

feed.title: Banner Corp Stock: Regional Banking Leader with Strong Pacific Northwest Footprint and Recent Leader
feed.summary: Banner Corp, parent company to Banner Bank, is a regional banking leader primarily serving the Pacific Northwest with commercial and consumer banking services. The company recently promoted Jennifer Krug to Executive Vice President, signaling a focus on operational enhancements and efficiency. With a stable business model, prudent lending practices, and strategic growth drivers, Banner Corp offers North American investors exposure to stable regional banking, while advising vigilance on interest rate changes and economic shifts in its key markets.

feed.title: Assessing Analog Devices (ADI) Valuation After Recent Share Price Pullback And Conflicting Fair Value Signals
feed.summary: Analog Devices (ADI) has experienced a recent stock pullback following strong 12-month and 3-year returns. While a popular narrative suggests ADI is 17.4% undervalued with a fair value of $379.64 due to growth in AI infrastructure and other high-value segments, a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) model indicates overvaluation, with a fair value of $186.52 against its current price of ~$313. Investors are advised to examine underlying assumptions and consider risks before making investment decisions.

feed.title: Is It Time To Reconsider Apellis Pharmaceuticals (APLS) After Its Recent Share Price Slump?
feed.summary: Apellis Pharmaceuticals (APLS) has seen significant share price declines recently, making its current price of US$17.64 potentially interesting. A Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis suggests the stock is 84.7% undervalued, with an intrinsic value of $115.07 per share. However, its Price-to-Earnings (P/E) ratio of 100.7x is well above the biotech industry average and Simply Wall St's proprietary Fair Ratio of 32.6x, indicating it is overvalued on this measure.

feed.title: Bristol-Myers Squibb stock price forecast: consolidation likely as BMY eyes upper range resistance
feed.summary: Bristol-Myers Squibb (BMY) is demonstrating sustained bullish momentum in the medium to long term, trading above its 50 and 200-day moving averages, despite short-term resistance. The stock recently presented new clinical data at ACC26 and received regulatory approval for immunotherapy combinations for Hodgkin lymphoma, reinforcing its growth narrative. Technical indicators suggest potential near-term consolidation within the $58.20 to $60.80 range, with a high probability of a price increase and limited downside risk.

feed.title: Ulta Beauty (ULTA) Valuation In Focus After Recent Share Price Pullback
feed.summary: Ulta Beauty (ULTA) has seen a recent share price pullback, prompting a re-evaluation of its valuation. While some narratives suggest it's 22% overvalued with a fair value of $427.41, others point to its P/E ratio being below peers but above the industry average, indicating a mixed valuation picture. The article discusses Ulta's competitive advantages in the beauty retail space, its growth opportunities including international expansion, and potential risks from competition.

feed.title: Banco Bilbao Vizcaya Argentaria S.A. Stock: A Global Banking Powerhouse with Strong Fundamentals for
feed.summary: Banco Bilbao Vizcaya Argentaria S.A. (BBVA) is presented as a global banking powerhouse with a robust presence in retail, investment, and asset management across Europe, Latin America, and other markets. The article highlights BBVA's resilient strategy amidst global economic shifts, its strong financial metrics, attractive dividend yields, and its appeal for North American investors seeking diversified exposure. It also touches upon key risks, including emerging market volatility and regulatory challenges, while outlining catalysts for future performance.

feed.title: Expeditors International Stock: A Steady Force in Global Logistics Amid Evolving Trade Dynamics
feed.summary: Expeditors International (EXPD) is a global leader in third-party logistics, focusing on air and ocean freight forwarding and operating an asset-light business model. The company's disciplined growth, strong financial performance, and extensive global network position it as a resilient investment in the cyclical logistics sector. For North American investors, EXPD offers exposure to global trade recovery with stability, supported by its Nasdaq listing, dividend history, and U.S. presence, though geopolitical tensions and freight rate volatility remain risks.

feed.title: AST SpaceMobile (ASTS) COO receives 54,687 performance share units in equity grant
feed.summary: AST SpaceMobile's Chief Operating Officer, Shanti B. Gupta, was granted 54,687 shares of Class A Common Stock through performance-based stock unit awards, as reported in a recent Form 4 filing. These units will vest in installments on March 31, 2026, March 31, 2027, and March 31, 2028, contingent on her continued employment. Following this award, Gupta directly holds a total of 387,062 shares.

feed.title: Annovis Partners With NeuroRPM to Add AI Monitoring in PD Study
feed.summary: Annovis Bio, Inc. has partnered with NeuroRPM to integrate an FDA-cleared AI platform into its ongoing Phase 3 study for Parkinson's disease. This collaboration will utilize wearable technology to continuously monitor core Parkinson's symptoms in real-world settings, providing comprehensive data on disease progression and treatment response. The study, which also includes a diagnostic biomarker test, aims to gather extensive information for a deeper understanding of Parkinson's disease.

feed.title: Aptevo Therapeutics (NASDAQ: APVO) outlines bispecific cancer pipeline and AML data
feed.summary: Aptevo Therapeutics (NASDAQ: APVO) detailed its bispecific cancer pipeline and clinical trial data for its lead acute myelogenous leukemia (AML) candidate, mipletamig, in its latest 10-K filing. Mipletamig, a CD123xCD3 T-cell engager, demonstrated an 86% clinical benefit rate and no cytokine release syndrome in frontline AML patients during the RAINIER trial. The company is also advancing ALG.APV-527 for solid tumors, as well as six preclinical candidates leveraging its ADAPTIR and ADAPTIR-FLEX platforms.

feed.title: BellRing Brands (BRBR) Well-Positioned for “Easy Protein” Boom
feed.summary: BellRing Brands Inc. (NYSE: BRBR) is identified as a well-positioned mid-cap consumer defensive stock due to the increasing mainstream adoption of protein products. While Jefferies maintained a "Buy" rating with a $28 price target, Bank of America Securities reiterated a "Neutral" rating with a reduced price target of $22, citing a competitive landscape. BellRing Brands markets its nutrition products under the Dymatize and Premier Protein brands, and the article suggests that AI stocks might offer greater returns despite BRBR's potential.

feed.title: Ads-Tec Energy (NASDAQ: ADSE) CEO discloses shares, options and warrants
feed.summary: Ads-Tec Energy Public Ltd Co CEO Thomas Speidel has filed an initial statement of beneficial ownership (Form 3), detailing his holdings in the company. The filing reports direct ownership of 254,439 Ordinary Shares and indirect ownership of 18,020,882 Ordinary Shares through ads-tec Energy GmbH, along with various non-qualified stock options and 800,000 warrants. This Form 3 establishes his initial equity position as a director, officer, and 10% owner, and does not indicate any recent purchases or sales of securities.

feed.title: Federal Agricultural Mortgage (AGM) principal accounting officer to retire; CFO named interim
feed.summary: Federal Agricultural Mortgage Corporation (AGM) announced that Gregory N. Ramsey, Vice President – Chief Accounting Officer and principal accounting officer, will retire on April 8, 2026. Matthew M. Pullins, the current Executive Vice President – Chief Financial Officer and Treasurer, will assume the role of interim principal accounting officer. The company clarified that Ramsey's retirement is not due to any disagreements regarding accounting policies or operations.

feed.title: WisdomTree Interest Rate Hedged U.S. Aggregate Bond Fund (NASDAQ:AGZD) Declares Dividend Increase - $0.08 Per Share
feed.summary: The WisdomTree Interest Rate Hedged U.S. Aggregate Bond Fund (NASDAQ:AGZD) announced a monthly dividend increase to $0.08 per share, up 14.3% from the previous $0.07. This dividend is payable on March 30th to shareholders of record on March 26th, implying an annualized yield of approximately 4.3%. AGZD trades at $22.49 and seeks to neutralize duration risk by holding U.S. investment-grade bonds and shorting Treasury futures.

feed.title: 10.8M Acumen shares registered for resale (NASDAQ: ABOS)
feed.summary: Acumen Pharmaceuticals, Inc. has registered 10,833,331 shares of its common stock for resale, which were previously issued in a private placement on March 16, 2026, at $3.30 per share. The company will not receive any proceeds from these resales, but is fulfilling a Registration Rights Agreement to allow selling stockholders to resell shares. The registration is administrative, with the company's primary value drivers remaining its R&D milestones for sabirnetug and its EBD program, with topline ALTITUDE-AD results expected in late 2026 and an IND for an EBD program targeted for mid-2027.

feed.summary: Aptevo Therapeutics Inc has reported its earnings results for the quarter ended September 30. feed.title: QUALCOMM Incorporated Stock: Navigating Semiconductor Headwinds and Valuation Opportunities in 2026
feed.summary: QUALCOMM Incorporated is facing semiconductor headwinds in 2026, with its stock declining 24.5% year-to-date, primarily due to challenges in the smartphone market. Despite these pressures, the company announced a $20 billion share repurchase program and increased its quarterly dividend, signaling management confidence. Valuation metrics suggest the stock may be undervalued, with multiple analyses indicating significant upside potential for investors.

feed.title: Exxon Mobil Corporation Stock: A Comprehensive Analysis of Business Model, Energy Transition, and In
feed.summary: This article provides a comprehensive analysis of Exxon Mobil Corporation's business model, competitive strengths, and strategic initiatives. It highlights how the integrated energy company navigates the energy transition through disciplined capital allocation, technological innovation, and investments in low-carbon solutions, making it an attractive option for North American investors seeking stability and dividend income, despite inherent industry risks.

feed.summary: The Procter & Gamble Company is focusing on a premiumization strategy with new product launches like Pampers AMORE and upgraded Dawn products to drive value and ensure resilient growth in the consumer staples sector. Despite facing competitive pressures, tariffs, and potential softening demand, P&G aims to maintain margin resilience through innovation. The company's strong brand portfolio, financial performance, and dividend aristocrat status make it an attractive investment for North American investors seeking stability.

feed.summary: The article analyzes Boeing's business resilience, recent contracts, and opportunities for investors. Despite operational challenges, Boeing secured a $326 million U.S. Army deal and has potential $36.2 billion Korean Air orders, positioning its shares for long-term value in the aerospace sector. The company's dual focus on commercial jets and defense systems, strong Q4 2025 results, and a "Moderate Buy" consensus reinforce its investment appeal for investors monitoring defense stability and commercial recovery.

The filing clarifies that this is an administrative reporting change and not an active buy or sell transaction.

feed.title: Alight (ALIT) awards 1,250,000 performance stock units to Chief Legal Officer
feed.summary: Alight, Inc. (ALIT) has awarded its Chief Legal Officer, Martin Felli, 1,250,000 performance stock units. These units, which represent contingent rights to receive Class A common stock, will vest in increments of up to 25% based on specific stock price performance hurdles and service-based conditions over a five-year period from April 1, 2026, to December 31, 2030. Following this grant, Felli directly holds 571,360 shares of Class A common stock.

feed.title: Vanguard disaggregates holdings for ACNB (NASDAQ: ACNB) after internal realignment
